scope: DIA FTA v2 — FP elimination (final 2 self-analysis findings)

features.description: _AUXILIARY_DIRS extended with 'artifacts' and 'work_artifacts' to suppress CI/build artifact and working directories from undocumented-dir findings
features.fn_risk: negligible — directories named 'artifacts' or 'work_artifacts' are not architectural source modules

features.description: ADR-017 illustrative path examples moved from inline codespans to fenced code blocks; DIA already skips block_code tokens, so trust_codespans=True no longer extracts example refs as phantom dirs
features.change: docs/decisions/ADR-017-dia-false-positive-reduction.md: CS-2 example wrapped in fenced code block
features.fn_risk: none — fenced block skipping is established behavior, not a new code path

context.note: Ground truth precision/recall fixtures unaffected — all changes target self-analysis FPs not representable in the existing fixture corpus
